name: Carson Ballard
note: Draft-eligible after a 46-inning spring; went undrafted July 14 — no 2026 summer club.

name: Jake Lankie
note: No 2026 summer club found (pitched for Willmar in 2025); went undrafted July 14.

name: Dylan Loy
note: Draft-eligible after a 45-inning spring; went undrafted July 14 — no 2026 summer club.

name: Caden Gaudette
note: Graduated in May after a team-leading 26 appearances; no summer club as of mid-July, expected back at GT as a post-grad.

name: Justin Shadek
note: Held out of summer ball for the MLB Draft; went undrafted July 14 and is expected back at GT.

name: Jackson Blakely
note: Signed with Willmar in February but has not appeared — likely a post-Tommy John innings shutdown after his 64-inning spring.

name: Jamie Vicens
note: No longer on Willmar's roster as of mid-July, after five appearances.

name: Cooper Underwood
note: Assigned to Y-D and featured in the league's June preview, but removed from the roster without appearing — likely shut down after 23.2 freshman innings.

name: Dimitri Angelakos
note: Made one Brookhaven (Sunbelt) appearance on June 26 before joining Y-D two days later.

name: Ryan Zuckerman
note: 2026 ACC MVP held out of summer ball for the MLB Draft; went undrafted July 14 and is expected back at GT.

name: Will Baker
note: Held out of summer ball for the MLB Draft; went undrafted July 14 and is expected back at GT.

name: Kent Schmidt
note: Forwent the 2026 MLB Draft to return for his senior year; not re-signed by Falmouth after his 2025 Cape All-Star summer.

name: Logan Keilen
note: No longer on Bismarck's roster as of early July, after 13 games.

name: Cooper Blauser
note: Committed to GT on June 26 after a 62-game season at Jacksonville State; no 2026 summer club.

name: Jackson Morgan
note: No 2026 summer club found; played for the Alpharetta Aviators (Sunbelt) in 2024.

name: Josh Gunther
note: Went undrafted July 14; no 2026 summer club — likely training privately after 37.2 IP at South Carolina.

name: Jayden Stroman
note: Off Orleans' active roster since late June after three relief appearances.

recruit.highlight: First-team all-state 3B/RHP as a junior; dual-sport athlete who also signed with GT football.
Prep Baseball California Hitter of the Week after a 7-for-11 road trip with Mater Dei.

name: Kolby Martin
note: Has not appeared for Brookhaven since June 17 but remains on the active roster.

recruit.highlight: Threw a nine-strikeout no-hitter for Creekview this spring; GHSA All-State first team. Son of former MLB LHP C.J. Nitkowski.
Threw back-to-back no-hitters this spring (26 K over 12 IP) — a Prep Baseball National Pitcher of the Week.

name: Isaiah Galason

recruit.highlight: 2025 PG All-American Classic selection and PG's No. 2 HS shortstop in Georgia; hit .422 with 28 steals as a senior before going in round 17 to the Nationals.

note: On the Macon Bacon's iScore roster (#2 INF) — 2 games through Jul 18 (1-for-7, 2 RBI), though absent from the team's public roster page. Drafted in round 17 (No. 496) by Washington on July 12 — an unlikely-to-sign insurance pick; expected at GT barring a surprise before the July 27 deadline.
